# FO76 Test Fixtures

Fixtures for the FO76 -> FO4 conversion test suite. Total budget: keep this
tree under ~200 KB; current footprint is well below that.

## Layout

```
fo76/
  textures/   synthesized DDS files with known channel values (this README)
  materials/  real BGSM/BGEM samples extracted from a Fallout 76 install
  cdb/        (deferred) MaterialsDB.cdb fixture
```

## Texture fixtures (synthesized)

Generated by `../_generate.py` (run manually with
`uv run python bacup/py_bacup_lib/python/bacup_lib/tests/fixtures/fo76/_generate.py` to
regenerate). Each file is a fully uncompressed 8x8
`DXGI_FORMAT_B8G8R8A8_UNORM` DDS — no mipmaps, no DXT — so tests can decode
the pixel block with `struct` alone, with no dependency on `texconv` at test
time.

The full file (DDS magic + 124-byte header + 256 bytes of pixel data) is
exactly 384 bytes. Every pixel within a single fixture has the same RGBA
value, listed below. Tests asserting against the texture remix logic should
match these values exactly:

| File           | R   | G   | B   | A   | Role intent                       |
| -------------- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --------------------------------- |
| `color_d.dds`  | 128 |  64 |  32 | 255 | FO76 albedo / diffuse             |
| `normal_n.dds` | 128 | 128 | 255 | 255 | FO76 tangent-space normal (+Z)    |
| `rough_r.dds`  | 200 |  50 | 255 |   0 | FO76 packed: R=rough G=metal B=AO |

The byte layout in the file is BGRA (DDS native order for this pixel
format), so byte offset 128 (start of pixel data) for `color_d.dds` is
`32 64 128 255` repeating for 64 pixels.

## Material fixtures (extracted from FO76 install)

| File             | Origin                                                              | Version |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| `sample_v22.bgsm` | `Data/SeventySix - Materials.ba2 :: materials/actors/alien/alien_body.bgsm` | 22 |
| `sample_v22.bgem` | `Data/SeventySix - Materials.ba2 :: materials/actors/alien/alien_glass.bgem` | 22 |

Both are public Bethesda Fallout 76 base game assets and were chosen because
they are the smallest exemplars of the v22 (>= v20) header layout that the
new BGSM/BGEM FO76 version extensions need to parse. Sizes: BGSM = 352 B,
BGEM = 290 B.

## CDB fixture (deferred)

`cdb/` is empty pending Task 9 (MaterialsCDB reader). No CDB file ships in
the standalone Fallout 76 install at `Data/`, the `extracted/fo76/` mirror,
or the upstream `refs/fo76texconv` / `refs/fo76utils-main` test trees, so
the CDB fixture will be bootstrapped by the parser implementation in Task 9
(see plan Task 9 Step 2).
